title: Algerian Baked Snapper with Savory Papillote
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish that combines the delicate taste of snapper with the aromatic flavors of Algerian cuisine.
instructions: Rinse the snapper fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the snapper with salt and black pepper.
Cut the savory papillote into four equal pieces.
Place a piece of papillote on each snapper fillet, leaving a small border around the edges.
Drizzle the olive oil over the papillote and sprinkle with garlic and parsley.
Squeeze a bit of lemon juice over the top.
Place the snapper on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
